hooks.command: jq -r '.prompt' | grep -qiE 'скриншот|screenshot|сделай скрин|покажи как выглядит|сфоткай|сфотографируй|снимок экрана' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"The user wants a screenshot. Use the /screenshot slash command via the Skill tool with the user message as args. Example: Skill({ skill: \"screenshot\", args: \"<user request>\" })"}}' || echo '{}'
